rationale: The gpt-oss-120b candidate provided a much more complete and professional translation compared to the 'current' and 'qwen' versions, which both had a broken title ('Важ') and duplicated sections at the end. The gpt-oss-120b version correctly translated the content while maintaining the technical tone and MDX structure, although it left the Table of Contents anchor links pointing to English IDs, which requires fixing.
